message:
fix(status): idle prompts take priority over historical errors

When an agent shows an idle prompt AND has low velocity (not actively
outputting), classify it as WAITING regardless of historical error
messages in the scrollback. Error patterns from earlier in the session
are not relevant when the agent has clearly recovered.

Detection priority is now:
1. Idle prompt + low velocity -> StateIdle
2. Error patterns -> StateError (only if not at idle prompt)
3. Idle prompt (any velocity) -> StateIdle
4. Recent activity -> StateWorking
5. Heuristics and defaults

This fixes false ERROR states in `ntm activity` when agents have
recovered from errors and are waiting at their prompt.

Adds test: idle_prompt_takes_priority_over_historical_errors_when_velocity_low

Related: #29 (closed PR - implemented independently per policy)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
